name: Horizontal Wrapping Machine
description: Packs products in horizontal form — bread, candy, biscuit, wafer, vegetables and similar regular-shaped items.

name: Multihead Weigher
description: High-accuracy, high-speed weigher for candy, biscuit, nuts, screw nails, granules, salty vegetables and similar products.

name: Vertical Form Fill Seal Machine
description: Complete VFFS system with multihead weigher, Z-conveyor, platform and output conveyor. Suitable for candy, biscuit, nuts, screw nails, granules, salty vegetables and similar products.

name: Auger Filling Machine
description: Semi-automatic auger filling machine for powder dosing products — spice powder, washing powder, granules, nuts and similar products.
